name: io.github.chopmob-cloud/algovoi-mcp-server
description: AlgoVoi crypto payments via MCP: on-chain USDC + native on 7 chains (Algorand, VOI, Hedera, Stellar, Base, Solana, Tempo). Supports x402, MPP, and AP2 payment protocols on a single endpoint. Solana flow uses native Solana Pay `reference` pubkey binding.

environmentVariables.name: ALGOVOI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your AlgoVoi API key (algv_...) from https://dash.algovoi.co.uk.

environmentVariables.name: ALGOVOI_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: AlgoVoi API base URL. Default cloud.algovoi.co.uk (managed payouts) or api1.ilovechicken.co.uk.

environmentVariables.name: ALGOVOI_TENANT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Tenant UUID. Required only for direct API access. Leave unset when using AlgoVoi Cloud.

environmentVariables.name: ALGOVOI_PAYOUT_ADDRESS
environmentVariables.description: Default payout wallet address. Required only for direct API access; managed in Cloud otherwise.

environmentVariables.name: ALGOVOI_WEBHOOK_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Optional HMAC-SHA256 secret for webhook verification. Enables the verify_webhook tool.
